# Prism Docs (LLMs Full)

## Zone
- Name: docs
- Base path: /docs
- Purpose: Product documentation zone for Prism.

## Public routes
- /docs
- /docs/getting-started
- /docs/guides/installation
- /docs/index
- /docs/aboute

## APIs
- /docs/api/search
  - Method: GET
  - Query params:
    - q (optional): text search query
  - Behavior:
    - Returns JSON with matching docs pages based on title, route, and keywords.

- /docs/api/og
  - Method: GET
  - Query params:
    - title (optional): heading text in generated OG image
    - section (optional): subheading text in generated OG image
  - Behavior:
    - Returns a 1200x630 PNG Open Graph image.

## Metadata and SEO
- Metadata is configured in the docs app layout and per-page metadata is provided for key pages.
- Canonical docs homepage URL path: /docs
- OG image path pattern: /docs/api/og?title=<...>&section=<...>

## Search index scope
Current docs search includes:
- Prism Docs (/docs)
- Getting Started (/docs/getting-started)
- Installation Guide (/docs/guides/installation)
- Docs Index (/docs/index)
- Aboute (/docs/aboute)
